en.extract:
The dusky-blue flycatcher (Bradornis comitatus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It has a wide range of presence across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''dusky-blue flycatcher''' ('''''Bradornis comitatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]]. It has a wide range of presence across the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
